zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd於大約1170年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根澤德時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach41歲，母親Mabel FitzWilliam21歲。他與Sara le Sore在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd于大约1170年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根澤德时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach41岁，母亲Mabel FitzWilliam21岁。他与Sara le Sore在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Felyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd was born about 1170, in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, was 41 and his mother, Mabel FitzWilliam, was 21. He married Sara le Sore in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd est né environ 1170, à Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzWilliam, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sara le Sore à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd um 1170 in Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach 41 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzWilliam 21. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Sara le Sore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1170 nel Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzWilliam, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Sara le Sore nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Felyn ap Gruffuddが約1170年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンセングヘニーッドで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Ifor Bachは41歳，母Mabel FitzWilliamは21歳であった。イギリスウェールズでSara le Soreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 센게이니드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzWilliam(은)는 21세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Sara le Sore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzWilliam, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Sara le Sore em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd родился около 1170 г. в местности сеньхенидд, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzWilliam, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara le Sore в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1170, en Senghenydd, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzWilliam, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sara le Sore en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
